# Smart Modular Data Center Solutions

Huawei offers a comprehensive range of smart modular data center solutions designed for small to medium-sized data centers across various industries including enterprises, banks, governments, carriers, education, healthcare, financial institutions, transportation, and energy sectors.

## Key Product Series

### FusionModule2000
Designed for small- and medium-sized data centers of enterprises, banks, governments, carriers, and education and healthcare organizations.

### FusionModule800
Tailored for small-sized data centers of financial institutions, governments, education and medical organizations, transportation and energy sectors.

### FusionModule500
Built for small-sized data centers of financial institutions, governments, education and medical organizations, transportation and energy sectors.

These modular solutions provide pre-integrated infrastructure combining power distribution, cooling, monitoring, and management capabilities in a scalable, efficient package.
